headline: What A Patient Investor Really Pays For Broadcom Stock
summary: The sticker price on this AI chip leader is high, but the real question is whether you believe the growth that makes it cheaper down the road.

headline: These 3 Semiconductor Stocks Just Got a Bullish Nod From Citi. Buy the Dip.
summary: Citi highlighted Broadcom (AVGO), Texas Instruments (TXN), and Applied Materials (AMAT) as attractive buys following the recent semiconductor sector selloff triggered by Broadcom’s Q2 results.
